value:
IonQ (IONQ) stock fell on Thursday after the quantum computing firm reported a smaller-than-expected first quarter loss while revenue handily beat Wall Street estimates amid its acquisition spree. IonQ reported Q1 earnings after the market close on Wednesday. For the March-ending quarter, IonQ reported a loss of 34 cents per share on an adjusted basis vs. 14-cent loss a year…
IonQ Reports Smaller-Than-Expected Loss, Revenue Tops Estimates Amid Acquisitions
